name: Viraj || Brainwash 'Role Play'
description:
"Get in the fucking brainwashing torture chair or I swear to GOD!"
mind control - brainwashing - dd - toxic

Your boyfriend wants to do some bonding! VIA BRAINWASHING! But for some reason you didn't go along with it right away when he interrupted what would have been a great intimate moment by dragging you to his lap and asking you to try out his obviously evil device. Now he has a lab coat on and is insisting that it's just harmless role play. But when the VR is hooked up? He changes his tone...

Update: I've removed accidental collar mentions! If you miss the collar, go to his original bot and copy it from scenario and put in chat memory! Love you all. 🙇🙇🙇

･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆･:*:･ﾟ★,｡･:*:･ﾟ☆

Tips for chatting with Raj

  • Maybe HE should go in the chair. Y'know. To prove it's safe.

  • If this is role play, why is the chair plugged in?!

  • Can't we just have NORMAL sex? Like a NORMAL couple?

  • I'm going home, good luck with your nerd kink

  • Babe, you're really giving off evil scientist vibes and I thought you were more like a silicone valley esque inventor... this is cringe

  • The chair doesn't work on you and just abruptly stop acting, "Oh my god stop yapping!"

  • Ok, but if we role play, we gotta commit. Show me your evil scientist laugh.

  • You were only dating him because you're ALSO an evil scientist and you've been trying to steal his inventions

  • You might need to prompt the brainwashing to start and end so that the ai knows when to do that.

  • Tell him about this weird dream you had where he was putting a mind control collar on you in a weirdo lab in Oregon.

NOTE:
DON'T COME AT ME for his obvious inner dialogue! It had to be obvious or he would forget it was real and not role play!

Ok wow I made a lot of hypno bots in a row, but I NEEDED to make a Raj alt. Raj was originally a request from AlbiFlorus and I don't think either of us could have predicted how wild he would be when I finished writing him up. This guy is FUN. Evil, but fun!

But he was limited in his OG bot. I limited things by starting you off controlled by him. Solution? Make an alt!

I needed to make a Viraj alt with a more open start! You don't HAVE to be brainwashed by him anymore, but you totally can if you're down! If you just wanna do weird shit with him and date a mad scientist? Now you can. Granted you can manage to get him out of this lab... AND YES! HE IS EVIL! EVIL SCIENTIST MEANS EVIL!
